name: Slider
visual_summary: The Slider component is a visual representation of a range value that can be adjusted by the user. It is commonly used to allow users to select a value within a certain range. This could be used for settings, configurations, or other use cases where users need to pick a specific value within a range.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready input component with the following characteristics:

Name: Slider
Description: The Slider component is a visual representation of a range value that can be adjusted by the user. It is commonly used to allow users to select a value within a certain range. This could be used for settings, configurations, or other use cases where users need to pick a specific value within a range.
Style: minimal
Interactions: clickable, hover
Tags: input, range, configurable

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
